headline: Swiss Q1 2026 GDP +0.4%, industry drives growth as domestic demand stalls
summary: SECO confirms Swiss Q1 2026 GDP +0.4% on manufacturing while final domestic demand grew just 0.1%.

headline: Vaud minimum wage future and social partnership debated
summary: Le Temps examines the future of social partnership under the Vaud cantonal minimum wage.

headline: Vaud confronts behavioural disorders in compulsory schooling
summary: Canton Vaud launches a front-on approach to behavioural troubles in compulsory school.

headline: Swiss glaciers face one of worst snow years, ill-prepared for summer
summary: Le Temps reports Swiss glaciers lack snow after one of the worst observed years.

headline: Swiss civil-aviation drone, GPS and passenger incident reports rise sharply
summary: BAZL reports a marked rise in reported drone, GPS interference and disruptive-passenger incidents.

headline: Lebanon escalation: Israel strikes Beirut suburbs, pushes past Litani; Iran cuts US channel
summary: Israel ordered strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs and consolidated beyond the Litani; Iran reportedly halted its US message channel.

headline: French navy, backed by UK, intercepts Russian shadow-fleet oil tanker
summary: France seized a Russian shadow-fleet oil tanker with UK backing.

headline: Hungary's Magyar moves to amend constitution to remove President Sulyok
summary: Opposition leader Peter Magyar pushes a constitutional amendment to remove President Tamas Sulyok.

headline: Ethiopia holds elections with Abiy's party expected to dominate
summary: Ethiopia votes with PM Abiy Ahmed's Prosperity Party expected to dominate.

headline: Modi meets Myanmar military government leader in New Delhi
summary: Indian PM Modi met Myanmar's junta leader Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi.

headline: Teamwork Cloud / Magic Collaboration Studio deserialization RCE CVE-2026-7858 (CVSS 9.8)
summary: Critical unauthenticated deserialization RCE in Dassault No Magic Teamwork Cloud and CATIA Magic Collaboration Studio.

headline: Apache ActiveMQ Jolokia default-authz flaw CVE-2026-49157 plus code-injection flaws
summary: ActiveMQ default Jolokia authorization grants non-admin access; broker code-injection flaws disclosed.

headline: Apache Solr hardcoded-credentials flaw CVE-2026-44825 grants full admin (CVSS 8.1)
summary: Apache Solr Basic Auth setup tool installs hardcoded credentials allowing remote admin access.

headline: MediaTek June bulletin: wlan AP driver heap overflow RCE CVE-2026-20452 (CVSS 8.0)
summary: MediaTek discloses adjacent-network RCE in wlan AP driver plus GenieZone TEE privilege-escalation flaws.

headline: OTRS unauthenticated SQL-injection auth bypass CVE-2026-48188 (CVSS 9.1)
summary: OTRS database-layer SQL injection enables unauthenticated authentication bypass.

headline: Toward Identifiable Sparse Autoencoders (iSAE)
summary: Shows SAEs are unstable across runs and proposes architecture/training fixes for identifiability.

headline: ELUDe: lossless disentanglement of polysemantic neurons without performance loss
summary: Disentangles polysemantic neurons while preserving functional equivalence of the network.

headline: Why linear recurrent memory works in partially observable RL
summary: Theory showing linear recurrent filters reproduce HMM belief logits as sufficient statistics for optimal policy.

headline: SLAT: segment-level adaptive trimming for efficient chain-of-thought reasoning
summary: Trims redundant high-probability low-utility CoT segments to cut overthinking compute.

headline: Smaller models are natural explorers for policy-level diversity in GRPO
summary: Smaller same-family models give temporally-correlated rollout diversity improving GRPO exploration.

headline: DEM: distilled glass-box explanation model for interpretable physiological anomaly detection
summary: Distills a gradient-boosting expert into an interpretable decision tree over residuals for WBAN anomaly detection.
